channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: Appreciate the response, Peter! I completely understand the challenges of managing support at this s...
item.description:
Appreciate the response, Peter! I completely understand the challenges of managing support at this scale.
To clarify, these aren't cases of different people choosing the same name. All my skills use the "baoyu-" prefix—a personal identifier I've used for years. The sniped slugs are literal carbon copies of my repo's content, not original works.
Here is the error I’m hitting:
Uncaught ConvexError: Slug is already taken. Choose a different slug.
Since the git history (https://t.co/PLT3pVFaDE) confirms the original source, I’d love to see these reclaimed:
baoyu-xhs-images : /zhanghongbao22/baoyu-xhs-images baoyu-diagram : /hxr918/baoyu-diagram baoyu-post-to-x : /liuhedev/baoyu-post-to-x baoyu-danger-gemini-web : /wjctim/baoyu-danger-gemini-web
Thanks for looking into this!
--- @dotey | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 18
item.author: @dotey

item.author: @steipete
